globalNews.title: US to announce deal allowing Saudi Arabia a nuclear programme
globalNews.summary: The agreement would fulfil a long-held Saudi ambition but could attract concern in Israel and from some US lawmakers.

globalNews.title: Trump threatens to target Iran's bridges and power plants if Hormuz attacks persist
globalNews.summary: Donald Trump says the US will respond any time Iranian forces shoot at a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

globalNews.title: Tankers make sharp U-turns after Houthi shipping threat
globalNews.summary: All of the ships were travelling to or from Saudi ports before changing course, ship-tracking data shows.

globalNews.title: Ukrainian drones hit Russian online giant retailer Wildberries for second time
globalNews.summary: Logistics hubs belonging to Wildberries in the Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were struck overnight.

globalNews.title: Zelensky sacks Ukraine's top army commander after days of protests
globalNews.summary: Oleksandr Syrskyi is dismissed after backlash over the removal of popular Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov.

cryptoNews.title: The digital euro: Surveillance money, or a better alternative to cash?
cryptoNews.summary: Proponents of the digital euro say its a better alternative to cash that’s fully backed by the ECB. But critics argue it could provide the EU with too much power over its citizens.

cryptoNews.title: Franklin Templeton calls agentic AI next ‘killer’ use case for blockchain
cryptoNews.summary: Franklin Templeton’s digital assets lead said that the autonomous AI agent economy will increase demand for blockchain protocols hosting machine-to-machine micropayments.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin analysis eyes ‘serious volume’ after Binance sees 9K BTC daily outflow
cryptoNews.summary: Binance set multimonth records for net BTC outflows on Tuesday, adding to an emerging trend of positive inflows to the US spot Bitcoin ETFs.

cryptoNews.title: Zilliqa Ledger app vulnerability lets attackers recover signer’s private keys
cryptoNews.summary: A security vulnerability in the Zilliqa Ledger app is enabling attackers to reconstruct private keys using publicly available onchain data.

aiNews.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
aiNews.summary: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

aiNews.title: Passionfroot raises $15M to expand its B2B creator marketplace to the US
aiNews.summary: Passionfroot, a German startup building a marketplace connecting B2B creators with brands, has raised $15M in a Series A round led by Insight Partners.

aiNews.title: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era
aiNews.summary: Glow is targeting a new class of endpoint risks created by the rapid adoption of AI agents and developer tools inside enterprises.

aiNews.title: Synthesia’s AI training platform is moving beyond videos into live coaching

aiNews.title: The Anthropic-Physical Intelligence rumor roiling AI Twitter
aiNews.summary: Anthropic and OpenAI's aggressive 2026 acquisition sprees set the stage for a weekend rumor.
